diagram_title: Bound tool outputs and digest oversized history
description: Prevent any single tool result or accumulated history from exceeding the active model's per-request budget. Tool self-bounding caps individual results; chunked-digest compaction handles multi-round accumulated history; verify-after-compact ensures every kind's success actually reduces the prompt below budget.

outputs: new Anchor written by chunked-digest (when escalated)
mechanisms: Variable-size tools (read, grep, bash, webfetch, apply_patch, task, read_subsession)

activities.name: Bound Tool Output
activities.description: Variable-size tools enforce ctx.outputBudget on their own output before returning to the runtime; truncation hint is appended in plain language so AI knows what tool args to adjust for other slices.

activities.name: Compact Session With Verification
activities.description: Extended SessionCompaction.run: walks KIND_CHAIN, runs verify-after-compact per kind, escalates on still-too-large, falls through to chunked-digest as terminal kind.

activities.name: Configure Output Budget Defaults
activities.description: Compute per-call ctx.outputBudget by reading active model context and tweaks.cfg overrides; supply to tool framework on every dispatch.

activities.name: Estimate Natural Output Size
activities.description: Tool runs its read/exec/fetch as usual and estimates token count of the would-be output before serialising the response.

activities.name: Decide Pass-Through Or Slice
activities.description: If estimated tokens ≤ ctx.outputBudget, pass through unchanged. Otherwise enter slice path.

activities.name: Cut On Semantic Boundary
activities.description: Per-tool slicer cuts at line / paragraph / message / match boundary, never mid-token-mid-byte. apply_patch raises hard error rather than slice.

activities.name: Append Truncation Hint
activities.description: Append plain-language hint with literal anchor token, fraction, exact arg adjustment.

controls: DD-3 hint format and anchor token
outputs: final result string with trailing hint

activities.name: Walk KIND_CHAIN
activities.description: Iterate narrative → replay-tail → low-cost-server → llm-agent → chunked-digest, calling each kind handler in order.

activities.name: Verify After Compact
activities.description: After each kind reports success, re-estimate resulting prompt size; treat as failed if still over budget.

activities.name: Run Chunked-Digest
activities.description: Split history at round boundaries, walk model through chunk-by-chunk digestion under framing prompt that re-roles AI as digester, finalise as Anchor.

activities.name: Surface Terminal Error
activities.description: When all kinds (including chunked-digest) fail verify-after-compact, raise E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE up to runloop with hint that an individual round exceeds digest floor.

activities.name: Split History At Round Boundaries
activities.description: Identify (user msg + assistant msg with all tool_calls resolved) pairs; group into chunks of ~chunked_digest_chunk_target_tokens; exclude system prompt and unfinished trailing round.

activities.name: Digest Each Chunk
activities.description: For chunk k of N, build (digest_so_far, chunk_payload, framing_prompt) request, call LLM, validate response (must be JSON digest, no tool_calls), merge into digest_so_far.

activities.name: Finalise As Anchor
activities.description: After all chunks digested, write merged digest as assistant message with summary===true, append original triggering user request, return success.
